title: NightAI
subtitle: AI Agency
description: AI voice agents that answer calls, book appointments, and follow up. Around the clock.
longDescription: An end-to-end AI agent platform that runs your front office without lifting a finger. NightAI answers inbound calls with natural voice IVR, books appointments with calendar sync and double-booking protection, sends email reminders, and transfers to a human when needed. Built with Retell AI, Twilio, and OpenAI. Live in days, not months.

title: bantrwrld
subtitle: Social Platform
description: A next-generation social platform powered by AI.
longDescription: A comprehensive social platform integrating AI-powered features for a next-generation user experience. Built from the ground up with scalability and performance in mind.

title: bantrhaus
description: A cozy chatroom platform for real-time conversations.
longDescription: A real-time chatroom platform designed for seamless, cozy conversations. Features persistent rooms, user presence, and a clean interface built for community engagement.

title: RxClash
description: AI-powered medication analysis tool to prevent medical mishaps.
longDescription: A Gemini-powered AI medication analysis tool designed to inform patients and prevent dangerous drug interactions. Winner of the Patient Safety Technology Challenge at Uncommon Hacks 2025.

title: C++ Minesweeper
description: A classic Minesweeper game built in C++ with console UI.
longDescription: A faithful recreation of the classic Minesweeper game built entirely in C++ with a console-based user interface. Demonstrates strong fundamentals in algorithms and game logic.

title: EZ PC
description: Desktop app helping new PC gamers optimize their gaming experience.
longDescription: An Electron-based desktop application designed for new PC gamers to easily optimize their system settings and gaming experience without technical knowledge.

title: Sphere Render
longDescription: A C++ and OpenGL powered real-time 3D sphere renderer demonstrating graphics programming fundamentals including lighting, shading, and camera controls.
